assertion_results.text: Bug parsing correctly extracts all four required sections (Description, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result) using the heading formats from bug-template-mock.md (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md lines 19-27 list the heading formats from the template (### **Issue Description**, ### **Steps to Reproduce**, ### **Expected Result**, ### **Actual Result**). Lines 30-55 show all four sections parsed with full content. Line 28 confirms: 'All four required sections were found and parsed from the bug description.'

assertion_results.text: Bug validation confirms the issue type ID (10020) matches the Bug issue type ID from Bug Configuration (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md line 15: 'The issue's issuetype.id is **10020**, which matches the **Bug issue type ID** (10020) from Bug Configuration. Validation passed.'

assertion_results.text: Investigation identifies the trailing-whitespace heading extraction as the root cause — line[3:] does not strip whitespace (Steps 2-3)
assertion_results.evidence: investigation.md lines 13-18 trace the code path: 'The extraction line[3:] takes everything after ## but does NOT strip trailing whitespace. When the heading line is ## Migration Patterns  \n (with trailing spaces), the extracted section name becomes "Migration Patterns  " (with two trailing spaces).' Line 59: 'Root cause location: plugins/sdlc-workflow/skills/plan-feature/SKILL.md, convention conformance analysis section, heading extraction logic.'

assertion_results.text: Root cause comment includes: what is broken (heading extraction does not strip trailing whitespace), where it is broken (plan-feature convention lookup), and how to verify the fix (reproducer test with whitespace in heading) (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: root-cause.md line 9: 'The plan-feature skill's convention lookup extracts CONVENTIONS.md section headings using line[3:], which preserves trailing whitespace from the heading line.' Line 13: 'Affected Files: plugins/sdlc-workflow/skills/plan-feature/SKILL.md — Convention conformance analysis section, Heading extraction: section_name = line[3:] (missing .strip()).' Lines 29-34 provide reproducer strategy: create CONVENTIONS.md fixture with trailing whitespace on heading, run convention extraction, assert extracted name matches without trailing whitespace.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST acceptance criterion — before any fix criteria (Step 5 Acceptance Criteria ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 31 (first acceptance criterion): '- [ ] A reproducer test demonstrates the bug: a CONVENTIONS.md heading with trailing whitespace is correctly matched after the fix (the test fails before the fix and passes after)'. The fix criteria follow on lines 32-34.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST test requirement — with explicit assertion guidance derived from the Steps to Reproduce (Step 5 Test Requirements ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 37 (first test requirement): 'Reproducer test: create a CONVENTIONS.md fixture with trailing whitespace on a heading (e.g., ## Migration Patterns   with trailing spaces), run the convention extraction and lookup logic, and assert that the convention name "Migration Patterns" is found in the extracted conventions dictionary and that the generated Implementation Notes contain the convention reference Per CONVENTIONS.md. The test must fail before the fix (convention not found due to trailing whitespace mismatch) and pass after (convention correctly matched).' The assertion guidance is derived from the Steps to Reproduce scenario.

assertion_results.text: Task description includes a Bug Context section with Bug key (ACME-500), Steps to Reproduce, Expected/Actual Result, and Root Cause summary (Step 5 Bug Context extension)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 40-46 contain '## Bug Context' with: Bug key '[ACME-500](https://mock-jira.example.com/browse/ACME-500)', Steps to Reproduce (create CONVENTIONS.md with trailing whitespace, run /plan-feature), Expected Result (Implementation Notes should include convention), Actual Result (convention silently dropped), and Root Cause (line[3:] without stripping trailing whitespace).

assertion_results.text: Task description sets Target Branch to main (Step 5 Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 12: '## Target Branch' followed by line 13: 'main'.

assertion_results.text: Task description output includes ai-generated-jira in the Jira API metadata block showing it would be passed as a label to jira.create_issue (Step 5 Task creation)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 1-7: '# Jira API Metadata' section states 'The following parameters would be passed to jira.create_issue:' with '- **Labels**: `["ai-generated-jira"]`'.
